description:
A legacy geostationary communications satellite at 15.0W has suffered a total bus failure, leaving it stranded. Without active stationkeeping, it is drifting naturally westward toward the stable equilibrium point due to Earth's triaxial gravity. Using the mission script at ~/Documents/missions/defunct_geo_hazard.script, configure a high-fidelity gravity model (minimum Degree 8, Order 8) to accurately predict the drift over the 730-day propagation period. Determine the UTC date when the satellite's geographic longitude crosses -35.0 degrees (325.0 degrees East). Save the corrected script and record the crossing date in DD Mon YYYY format to ~/GMAT_output/hazard_prediction.txt.

Login: username=ga, password=password123
